title: senecio altaicus
intro: Senecio altaicus, also known as Altai ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia and Russia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Senecio altaicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and soothe irritated airways, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory problems. Senecio altaicus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
